lines.gurmukhi: ਕਲਰ ਖੇਤੀ ਤਰਵਰ ਕੰਠੇ ਬਾਗਾ ਪਹਿਰਹਿ ਕਜਲੁ ਝਰੈ ॥
lines.translit: kalar khetee taravar kantthe baagaa pahireh kajal jharai |
lines.english: He is like the crop planted in the salty soil, or the tree growing on the river bank, or the white clothes sprinkled with dirt.

lines.gurmukhi: ਏਹੁ ਸੰਸਾਰੁ ਤਿਸੈ ਕੀ ਕੋਠੀ ਜੋ ਪੈਸੈ ਸੋ ਗਰਬਿ ਜਰੈ ॥੬॥
lines.translit: ehu sansaar tisai kee kotthee jo paisai so garab jarai |6|
lines.english: This world is the house of desire; whoever enters it, is burnt down by egotistical pride. ||6||

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਯਤਿ ਰਾਜੇ ਕਹਾ ਸਬਾਏ ਦੁਹੁ ਅੰਤਰਿ ਸੋ ਜਾਸੀ ॥
lines.translit: rayat raaje kahaa sabaae duhu antar so jaasee |
lines.english: Where are all the kings and their subjects? Those who are immersed in duality are destroyed.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਹਤ ਨਾਨਕੁ ਗੁਰ ਸਚੇ ਕੀ ਪਉੜੀ ਰਹਸੀ ਅਲਖੁ ਨਿਵਾਸੀ ॥੭॥੩॥੧੧॥
lines.translit: kehat naanak gur sache kee paurree rahasee alakh nivaasee |7|3|11|
lines.english: Says Nanak, these are the steps of the ladder, of the Teachings of the True Guru; only the Unseen Lord shall remain. ||7||3||11||
One Universal Creator God. By The Grace Of The True Guru:
Maaroo, Third Mehl, Fifth House, Ashtpadheeyaa:
One whose mind is filled with the Lord's Love,

lines.gurmukhi: ਏਹਾ ਵੇਦਨ ਸੋਈ ਜਾਣੈ ਅਵਰੁ ਕਿ ਜਾਣੈ ਕਾਰੀ ਜੀਉ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: ehaa vedan soee jaanai avar ki jaanai kaaree jeeo |1|
lines.english: He alone knows the pain of this love; what does anyone else know about its cure? ||1||
is intuitively exalted by the True Word of the Shabad.
He Himself inspires us with His Love.
He Himself unites in His Union.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪ੍ਰੇਮ ਕੀ ਸਾਰ ਸੋਈ ਜਾਣੈ ਜਿਸ ਨੋ ਨਦਰਿ ਤੁਮਾਰੀ ਜੀਉ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: prem kee saar soee jaanai jis no nadar tumaaree jeeo |1| rahaau |
lines.english: He alone appreciates the value of Your Love, upon whom You shower Your Grace, O Lord. ||1||Pause||
One whose spiritual vision is awakened - his doubt is driven out.
By Guru's Grace, he obtains the supreme status.
By good destiny, the soul-bride is united with her Husband Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੋ ਜੋਗੀ ਇਹ ਜੁਗਤਿ ਪਛਾਣੈ ਗੁਰ ਕੈ ਸਬਦਿ ਬੀਚਾਰੀ ਜੀਉ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: so jogee ih jugat pachhaanai gur kai sabad beechaaree jeeo |2|
lines.english: He alone is a Yogi, who understands this way, and contemplates the Word of the Guru's Shabad. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਰੰਗ ਸਿਉ ਨਿਤ ਰਲੀਆ ਮਾਣੈ ਅਪਣੇ ਕੰਤ ਪਿਆਰੀ ਜੀਉ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: rang siau nit raleea maanai apane kant piaaree jeeo |3|
lines.english: With love, she continually enjoys pleasure with Him; she becomes the beloved of her Husband Lord. ||3||
Following the Guru's Teachings, she eradicates her evil-mindedness from within.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਮਿਲਿਐ ਮਰੈ ਮੰਦਾ ਹੋਵੈ ਗਿਆਨ ਬੀਚਾਰੀ ਜੀਉ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: satigur miliai marai mandaa hovai giaan beechaaree jeeo |4|
lines.english: Meeting with the True Guru, evil is conquered, and spiritual wisdom is contemplated. ||4||
He Himself is the Immaculate Lord.
Other than the True Guru, there is no physician.
becomes Gurmukh, and is rid of thirst and hunger.

lines.gurmukhi: ਏਹੁ ਸਬਦੁ ਸਾਰੁ ਜਿਸ ਨੋ ਲਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: ehu sabad saar jis no laae |
lines.english: One who is committed to this most sublime Shabad

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪਣ ਲੀਆ ਕਿਛੂ ਨ ਪਾਈਐ ਕਰਿ ਕਿਰਪਾ ਕਲ ਧਾਰੀ ਜੀਉ ॥੫॥
lines.translit: aapan leea kichhoo na paaeeai kar kirapaa kal dhaaree jeeo |5|
lines.english: By one's own efforts, nothing can be accomplished; the Lord, in His Mercy, bestows power. ||5||
The True Guru has revealed the essence of the Shaastras and the Vedas.
In His Mercy, He has come into the home of my self.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਜਨ ਮਾਹਿ ਨਿਰੰਜਨੁ ਜਾਤਾ ਜਿਨ ਕਉ ਨਦਰਿ ਤੁਮਾਰੀ ਜੀਉ ॥੬॥
lines.translit: anjan maeh niranjan jaataa jin kau nadar tumaaree jeeo |6|
lines.english: In the midst of Maya, the Immaculate Lord is known, by those upon whom You bestow Your Grace. ||6||
he eradictes his self-conceit from within.
One who becomes Gurmukh, obtains the essence of reality;

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਬਾਝਹੁ ਸਭੁ ਧੰਧੁ ਕਮਾਵੈ ਵੇਖਹੁ ਮਨਿ ਵੀਚਾਰੀ ਜੀਉ ॥੭॥
lines.translit: satigur baajhahu sabh dhandh kamaavai vekhahu man veechaaree jeeo |7|
lines.english: Without the True Guru, all are entangled in worldly affairs; consider this in your mind, and see. ||7||
Some are deluded by doubt; they strut around egotistically.
Some, as Gurmukh, subdue their egotism.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚੈ ਸਬਦਿ ਰਤੇ ਬੈਰਾਗੀ ਹੋਰਿ ਭਰਮਿ ਭੁਲੇ ਗਾਵਾਰੀ ਜੀਉ ॥੮॥
lines.translit: sachai sabad rate bairaagee hor bharam bhule gaavaaree jeeo |8|
lines.english: Attuned to the True Word of the Shabad, they remain detached from the world. The other ignorant fools wander, confused and deluded by doubt. ||8||
Those who have not become Gurmukh, and who have not found the Naam, the Name of the Lord

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਗੈ ਵਿਣੁ ਨਾਵੈ ਕੋ ਬੇਲੀ ਨਾਹੀ ਬੂਝੈ ਗੁਰ ਬੀਚਾਰੀ ਜੀਉ ॥੯॥
lines.translit: agai vin naavai ko belee naahee boojhai gur beechaaree jeeo |9|
lines.english: In the world hereafter, nothing except the Name will be of any assistance; this is understood by contemplating the Guru. ||9||
those self-willed manmukhs waste their lives uselessly.
The Ambrosial Naam is the Giver of peace forever.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸੁ ਤੂ ਦੇਵਹਿ ਸੋਈ ਪਾਏ ਨਾਨਕ ਤਤੁ ਬੀਚਾਰੀ ਜੀਉ ॥੧੦॥੧॥
lines.translit: jis too deveh soee paae naanak tat beechaaree jeeo |10|1|
lines.english: He alone receives it, unto whom You bestow it; this is the essence of reality which Nanak has realized. ||10||1||
Throughout the four ages, it is known through the Perfect Guru.
